data.body: CHECKPOINT: CLAUDE.md updated with 3 targeted additions — (1) Quick Reference table row for dso update-artifacts (line 39), (2) Artifact version check hook entry in Hook architecture section (line 50), (3) Artifact version stamps note in Architecture section (line 88). All acceptance criteria terms verified: update-artifacts, check-artifact-versions, dso-version. No commit per task instructions.
